issue_title: getThumbnail - TypeError: Failed to construct 'URL': Invalid URL
issue_body_preview:
<!-- **IMPORTANT!**
Before reporting a bug, please make sure that you have read through our documentation and you think your problem is indeed an issue related to our module. -->

### Version

nuxt-directus: 5.2.1
nuxt: 3.4.3

### Reproduction Link
[getThumbnail](https://nuxt-directus.netli
test_description_zh: 在页面中调用 getThumbnail 方法获取 Directus 资源的缩略图 URL，并将其作为图片 src 属性渲染到页面上，观察图片是否能正常显示。
expected_result_zh: getThumbnail 方法应返回有效的缩略图 URL，图片元素能正常加载并显示对应的缩略图，不会抛出 'TypeError: Failed to construct URL: Invalid URL' 错误。
